name: Master Knight
short_description: Player controls Master Knight in this 3rd person rpg adventure. His mission is to kill Werewolf and collect skulls in different areas
detailed_description:
Story:

Master Knight is 3rd person RPG adventure game, Game contains 12 different maps. Every level player mission is to kill Werewolf boss and avoid his army which contains different enemies like sword enemy, archer enemy and mage enemy. After killing Werewolf boss gate will be destroyed and player can collect skull which he need to survive. After collecting skull level is finished and player achieve steam achievements. Player can use different weapons like sword and 2 different arrows: normal and explosive. Also player have 20 health potions to use every level

Features:

- 12 different themed maps
- Several weapons like sword, bow and 2 different arrows. Player has normal and explosive arrows
- Health potions to increase health

  • Different enemies: Sword enemy, archer enemy and magic using enemy
    - Every level has Werewolf boss. Killing boss destroy gate and then player can collect skull and finisg levels
    - Steam achievements
